company.description: Company API lets you lookup company data via a domain name or company name

person.description: Person API lets you lookup a person based on an email address OR based on a domain name + first name + last name

company.description: The name of the company (e.g – amazon)

firstname.description: First name of the person (e.g – Marc)

lastname.description: Last name of the person (e.g – Benioff)
